card.卡片說明: It appears in people's dreams and awakens them with a bloody hook. But the hook smells like tomato. So, maybe the blood is…
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Bloody Hook in the Nightmare Cave.

card.卡片說明: It appears in people's dream and awakens them with a harsh scream. When you are pressed by the Scar Cat Robot, you will know where the scream comes from.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Soul Puller in the Nightmare Cave.

card.卡片說明: It is appears in people's dream and awakens them with Ghost shadows. All of them are made by the Evil Chieftain Pand and his Underling.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Evil Chieftain in the Nightmare Cave.

card.卡片說明: It is appears in people's dream and awakens them with machine noise. If Geber knows how to maintain the robots, how can they still be so noisy.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Violent Cat in the Nightmare Cave.

card.卡片說明: Lots of questions occur while exploring in the Nightmare Cave. If you always need to ask others for help, then why not recruit more people?
card.卡片提示: Exploration Assoc. Members of the Nightmare Cave in the South of Mirror Lake encounter difficulties, can you help them? (Related quest: Legendary proof)

card.卡片說明: He eats so much every day in order to better study steel gravity, but he has become fatter and fatter. Now it takes him over two hours to put on his boffin uniform.
card.卡片提示: The Gravity Technician in Palm Base is studying a mysterious product, but he seems to have met with a problem, maybe you can help him. (Related quest: Far from gravity)

card.卡片說明: He lived in the Castle before, but why was he exiled into the wild? Because he drank the blood of others.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Exiled Earl in the Foggy Forest.

card.卡片說明: They put on a performance in the South of Mirror Lake, but have no audience. Perhaps, it is because no one will sit still whilst they perform the flying knife trick on an audience.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Exiled Earl in the Foggy Forest.

card.卡片說明: He hates being ignored because he is too short. A loud sound means he is nearby and is very angry.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Steel Clamp in the North of Mirror Lake.

card.卡片說明: He opens his big eyes and big mouth and talks nonsense. However, if someone says he is crazy, he is certain to run after them!
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Crazy Rosit in the Quiet Vale.

card.卡片說明: [My hands are swollen but I have not managed to dig anything up. Now some monsters are stealing my things, how annoying!]
card.卡片提示: An Exploration Assoc. Member is baffled by an abyss. He is looking for help. If you help him, you may get his reward. Repeatable quest.(Related quests: Striving for resources, No time delay, Labor's difficulty)

card.卡片說明: Motor Merchant Plaim lives a luxurious life but pays no attention to the poor. His catchphrase is [If you don't have rice, why not eat cakes?]
card.卡片提示: There is a Motor Merchant Plaim in the Fiery Path. If you are in pursuit of business, you can learn from him. Repeatble quest.(Related quests: Business road-exploitation, Business road-utilizing others)

card.卡片說明: The Little Childe is never independent. He lost in the underground of the Riddle City, but he is also waiting for someone to save him.
card.卡片提示: There is a Little Childe at the Flaming Door. He is unruly and troublesome, can you put up with him? Repeatble quest. (Related quests: The unruly Little Childe, The Little Childe's new pet)

card.卡片說明: Why does the cute girl love to have afternoon tea with a ghost child?
card.卡片提示: A mysterious maiden, in Underground Square looks worried. Only the hero who can save the damsel in distress, can win her heart. Repeatable quest.(Related quests: The misted will, Poison antidote)

card.卡片說明: In order to keep his title of Master Chef, Faz practises his cooking skills every day. The dishes he cooks are so good that the Evil Lyceum decides to make trouble for him.
card.卡片提示: Chef Faz in the Flaming Door needs help. The helper needs run fast and be on time, can you do it? Repeatable quest. (Related quest: Food special)

card.卡片說明: Although it is planted in the Angel Lyceum for the Freshman to practice on, nobody cares for it.[Tender is also a fault?]
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating Lily in the Angel Lyceum.

card.卡片說明: Flame Lily is hiding in forest. It is attractive and enticing, but also dangerous!
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Flame Lily in the Dense Forest.

card.卡片說明: The flowers in the Mysterious Garden want to take over. But, most of them cannot move, so they have had to give up their evil plan.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating Queen Angela in the Dense Forest.

card.卡片說明: [How beautiful her petals are!] The one who approaches Quli thinking like that must be looking for trouble!
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the beautiful Quli in the Mysterious Wetland.

card.卡片說明: The Charming Flower with purple petals always wanders around the Underground Square. Don't let others know that she is lost.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Charming Flower in Underground Square.

card.卡片說明: She loves flowers and wants to leave Puqi Island to go and see all flowers of the world. However, will she still love the flower which bites?
card.卡片提示: Flora of Puqi Village has never left Puqi Island. You may choose to help her to realize her wish. (Repeatable quest: Flora's wish)

card.卡片說明: In order to pursue the highest level of flame magic, a young man entered Lava Cave to eat fire stones and drink magma. And so he became this strange apparition.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Theurgy Master in the Lava Cave.

card.卡片說明: It can be found in the lava environment. As it has the traits of glowing, shining and high temperature resistance, it has been touted as a new energy source by scientists.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Rock Slarm in the Lava Cave and the Flaming Door.

card.卡片說明: He wants to turn black in the fire, but as he is only a bodiless ghost, it only makes his face red.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Fire Ghost Kid in the Flaming Door, the Underground Square and the Hell Palace.

card.卡片說明: He is trapped in a small room. It will not5 help you to hurt him, but it may make you feel better.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Lion Dragon in the Gulp Room.

card.卡片說明: It is burning from head to foot, it will never die as long as it has things to keep it's fire going.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Demon Kidace in Gulp Room.

card.卡片說明: He likes to get to the bottom of problems. So he has no time to think of his wife… He'd better concentrate on his research.
card.卡片提示: Scientist Boni in the Gulp Room portal of the eastern Underground Square gets a once in a lifetime archeological chance. He wants to solve the puzzles of the Underground Palace, maybe he needs a hand. (Related quest: Bobo's wish)

card.卡片說明: It hasn't rain, but the road is extremely muddy. Maybe it is due to the North Lake Water Fairy。
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the North Lake Water Fairy in the North of Mirror Lake.

card.卡片說明: He is one of the four Fane Brothers. You can throw your anger, aroused by Fire Evil Elf, at him. (Maybe even worse XD)
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Mirror Elf in the Deity Palace Ruins.

card.卡片說明: He is the head of the North Lake Water Fairies but has a female name. Whoever laughs at his name will be soaked through.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Elf Narice in the North of Mirror Lake.

card.卡片說明: He likes to stay by the side of the lake and eat molluscs. He never leaves a trace, even when he goes to catch fish.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Platina Slarm in the North of Mirror Lake.

card.卡片說明: He makes the dump environment much colder. Don't forget to bring more warm clothes next time.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Marsh Wind Fairy in the Mysterious Wetland.

card.卡片說明: He is fond of restricting people, which may be the reason why he is not allowed into heaven.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Degenerate Angel in the Thunder Ruins.

card.卡片說明: As soon as the wind blows, Claya will suddenly turn up from the back moving round to the front. He is a mysterious monster.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Wind Fairy Clair in the Mysterious Wetland.

card.卡片說明: He leads a gang of slaves in digging. His red eyes are useful for working at night.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Slave Driver in the Sad Abyss.

card.卡片說明: He always has a hook and a sandglass, the former is the main tool of his wealth, the latter reminds him of the shifting nature of luck.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Purgatorial Azrael in the Thunder Ruins.

card.卡片說明: Born as a Giant, he has to work in the wild. You can say hello to him, but don't shake hands.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Evil Earth Elf in the Deity Palace Ruins.

card.卡片說明: Although he has a strong body, he is afraid of the dark. Only once a light is turned on, will he come out.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Guard Fasit in the Magic Kichen Path Instance.

card.卡片說明: Sunshine, air and water are not favored by him. He prefers the sour water from the depths. Obviously, he is an evil monster.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Evil Tree in the Sad Abyss.

card.卡片說明: It is said their race has evolved from mud. However, they seem to be able make steamed bread with a delicious smell.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Savage Dogface in the Thorn Wasteland.

card.卡片說明: He wishes more than anything to take a cold bath. Once, when he dipped himself in the Mirror Lake, the lake water turned into a hot spring at once.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Burning Monster in the Thunder Ruins.

card.卡片說明: It is said that if you take the Flame Elf home it will solve the problem of firewood. But no one dares to do it.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Theurgy Master in the Lava Cave.

card.卡片說明: He was a guard of Lucifer, but he loves drinking too much. It is said that his head would not be seperated from the wine bottle. So he separated his head from his body and then the body was sent off to be a Fervor Road Guard.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Jail Warden in the Fiery Path.

card.卡片說明: Poor Artisan, he has good skills for refining weapons but is too afraid to go collecting materials in the dangerous areas. What can he do?
card.卡片提示: Apprentice Andsen in Palm Base has learned all of the lessons. His master has given him a hard graduation test. He hopes someone can give him a hand. (Related quest: Andsen's graduated test)

card.卡片說明: Such materials could make a great suit of armor should the gods decide to bless it. But are you qualified to wear it?
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by advanced manufacturing the Holy Manteau and the Power Shield.

card.卡片說明: The golden fly is one of fuels needed. It seems that a lot of energy is needed for to move such a large robot.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Gold Fly in the Lava Cave, the Sad Abyss and the Fiery Path.

card.卡片說明: The Fat Angel holds his favorite muffin in his hand. Don't let him see you drool, even a lovely angel will become a devil.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Gluttonous Angel in the Underground Square and the Hell Palace.

card.卡片說明: His features are depicted in twinkling scales. You know he's coming by the shining lights. Don't fly to the fire like a moth.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Horn Dragon in the Hell Palace.

card.卡片說明: It seems to be the fuel crystal. The ore possesses good tenacity and tractility. Is it the so-called black gold?
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by collecting Silver Ore.

card.卡片說明: Why does the Suft C of C give orders to you? As long as your skills are known, then orders will come one after another.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by handing in Suft's orders of the Reborn Sword and Level 7 Big Hamburger.(Have to trade with Suft Branch in Palm Base)

card.卡片說明: What will happen if tartness meets hardness? We can only see by trying it out!
card.卡片提示: Apprentice Andsen in the Palm Base wants to forge a famous weapon but he is unable to find rare material, maybe you can help him. (Related quest: The sharpest material)

card.卡片說明: Every sword has to experience much to become an outstanding one. And then it may called a Reborn Sword.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by the advanced manufacturing of the Reborn Sword, the Fire Guard Boots, the Hermit Boots and the Energy Boots.

card.卡片說明: He is lost in maze which serves him right. As he always set traps on purpose for those who enter the maze.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Trapped Shar in the Gulp Room.

card.卡片說明: You must do what you have promised. And that is to uphold the main principle of keeping a co-operative relationship with the Suft Commence Association.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by handing in Suft's orders of the Shake Axe and the Level 7 Braised Fish.(Have to trade with Suft Branch in Palm Base)

card.卡片說明: Products can be only from certain materials. But moving the heavy materials into forging room is almost impossible.
card.卡片提示: Apprentice Andsen in the Palm Base wants to forge a famous weapon but he is unable to find rare material, maybe you can help him. (Related quest: The heaviest material)

card.卡片說明: This is rumored to be the weapon of Giant Race. It is incomparable.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by advanced manufacturing the Shake Axe, the Fire Guard Gloves, the Hermit Gloves and the Energy Gloves.

card.卡片說明: How can such a dim oil lamp light the road? Maybe endless wandering in the dark is his fate.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Wanderer of the Fiery Path.

card.卡片說明: It is a very much misunderstood plant. Upon coming close to it, one may see it flushed with red and assume that it is blood. However, really it is a shy plant. And the color you see is in fact the plant blushing, as a result very few people have ever seen the plants true color.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by collecting the Shy Plant.

card.卡片說明: Who gets the most profit from the current weapons and gear? Of course it's Suft. The craftsmen put a lot of effort into them, but they don't see the most money.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by handing in Suft's orders of the Thunder Spear and the Fire Guard Gloves.(Have to trade with Suft Branch in Palm Base)

card.卡片說明: How can a common stone compare with the hardest material? But how can you cut the material after finding it?
card.卡片提示: Apprentice Andsen in the Palm Base wants to forge a famous weapon but he is unable to find a rare material, maybe you can help him. (Related quest: The hardest material)

card.卡片說明: The Thunder Spear is famous for its fast attack and heavy damage. If it is matched with a cape it's performance will be even better.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by advanced manufacturing the Thunder Spear, the Fire Guard Armor, the Hermit Armor and the Energy Cape.

card.卡片說明: Although it has the name of a blood-sucker, it's favorite place to be is the scalding magma of the Fiery Path.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Sanguinary Flower in Fiery Path.

card.卡片說明: If you complete Suft's order smoothly, the Suft C of C will reward you.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by handing in Suft's orders of Level 7 Seafood Hamburger and the Hermit Boots.(Have to trade with Suft Branch in the Palm Base)

card.卡片說明: These curvy materials are hard to deal with. It will take more time to find a suitable one for processing.
card.卡片提示: Apprentice Andsen in the Palm Base wants to forge a famous weapon but he is unable to find rare material, maybe you can help him. (Related quest: The sinuatest material)

card.卡片說明: Taking the falling star line as a bowstring, the maker needs strong will to catch the tail of a star.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by advanced manufacturing the Heaven Bow, the Fire Guard Helmet, the Hermit Helmet and the Energy Boots.

card.卡片說明: The foreman talks a lot more than he gets work done. The tool in his hand is just a decoration. He always says[I am the foreman, how can I help you?]
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Miner Foreman in the Flaming Door.

card.卡片說明: How can Suft give you an order if you cannot promise the quantity and quality.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by handing in Suft's orders of the Fool Staff and the Energy Gloves.(Have to trade with Suft Branch in the Palm Base)

card.卡片說明: Lucid material is the purest thing in the world. Take care during delivery. If it was to fall then there would be no choice but to buy a new one.
card.卡片提示: Apprentice Andsen in the Palm Base wants to forge a famous weapon but he is unable to find rare material, maybe you can help him. (Related quest: The lucidest material)

card.卡片說明: Some say that a Fool makes the best wisdom tutor. The words of fool come closer to the truth and improve mana wisdom.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by advanced manufacturing the Fool Staff.

card.卡片說明: The eccentric earl, who loves to sleep in his tomb, says that sleeping like this always gives him the best hairstyle in the morning.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Earl Makice in Gulp Room.

card.卡片說明: If you are seeking the super speedy and deft weapon, then you may be the future sword maker!
card.卡片提示: Obtain it by collecting the Renascence Cardset.

card.卡片說明: If you are pursuing the super thick and destructive weapon, then you may be the future sword maker!
card.卡片提示: Obtain it by collecting the Earthquake Cardset.

card.卡片說明: If you are searching for the super long-reaching and puncturing weapon, then you may be the future spear maker!
card.卡片提示: Obtain it by collecting the Storm Cardset.

card.卡片說明: If you are exhuming the super far-reaching and exact weapon, then you may be the future bow maker!
card.卡片提示: Obtain it by collecting the Arc Cardset.

card.卡片說明: If you are questing for the super psychic and magic weapon, then you may be the future staff maker!
card.卡片提示: Obtain it by collecting the Wisdom Cardset.

card.卡片說明: He was a scientist who studied poisons, however, his head became poisoned and he became a propagator who likes casting poison
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Flamen Tomomy in the Gulp Room.

card.卡片說明: The first impression that he gives to others is one of rudeness. Actually, he is a house boy who likes to grow plants. But he often stamps on their flowers and breaks bottles by accident.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Overlord Legte in the Gulp Room.

card.卡片說明: A respectable craftsman should be strict on quality. After all, word of mouth can make or break his business.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by handing in Suft's orders of the Power Shield and the Level 7 Defense Fuel.(Have to trade with Suft Branch in the Palm Base)

card.卡片說明: He likes to do his thinking in a group of people. Nobody knows what he is thinking, but when someone gets close to his idea, he will surely know.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Flower Monster in the Gulp Room.

card.卡片說明: The lousy adhesive monster just keeps dividing itself more and more when you try to cut it.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Soul-eating Slalin in the Magic Kichen Path.

card.卡片說明: Nalica waits in her deep slumber for a handsome prince to wake her with true loves kiss. However, most people shun her.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Sleeper Nalica in the Gulp Room.

card.卡片說明: This is the habitat of a mysterious beast and attracts countless collectors. Take care while working, maybe the dream beast is behind you…..
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by collecting the Dream Beast Den.

card.卡片說明: Your supply of products is admired by Suft C of C. Don't hesitate, you must deliver them as soon as there is an order.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by handing in Suft's order of the Holy Manteau.(Have to trade with Suft Branch in the Palm Base)

card.卡片說明: The Garden Elf who looks after the flowers flies like a butterfly. Strangely, all the flowers he takes care of have the tendancecy to bite people.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Garden Elf in the Mysterious Garden.

card.卡片說明: Without a nose, he is immune to his own smell. He says that no one wants to be his friend. Anyone who comes too close to him will need to wash for hours until they become clean.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Pupu Demon in the Gulp Room and the Magic Kichen Path.

card.卡片說明: The Evil Eye will excrete colourful crystal when his stomach is too full. What precious waste!
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Evil Eye in the Gulp Room.

card.卡片說明: The fish from the dangerous areas taste more delicious. Also, only the fisherman who can overcome such difficulties may obtain it.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by collecting white fish.

card.卡片說明: It is not easy to be so outstanding when you have so many orders. But it is good to be the largest supplier of Suft.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by handing in Suft's orders of the Black Sycee, the Beast Fell Strip, the Cherry Thread,the Shy Batten and the White Fish Meat.(Have to trade with Suft Branch in the Palm Base)

card.卡片說明: They often dance in a small group and dream of becoming stars. But their movements are too stiff and clunky.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Fire Mummy in the Gulp Room.

card.卡片說明: Bathing in chocolate is his way of keeping white. But it is dirty of him to get out without washing himself clean afterwards.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Blood Winged Angel in the Hell Palace.

card.卡片說明: Cherry Grass will produce a kind of fairy fruit when the world is in chaos. However, when the world is chaotic, is the fruit necessary?
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by collecting Cherry Grass.

card.卡片說明: Suft C of C likes gifted craftsman. They send orders to the best craftsman in the world. Not only for business, but also for selecting greatest of them.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by handing in Suft's orders of the Benison Ring and the Energy Boots.(Have to trade with Suft Branch in the Palm Base)

card.卡片說明: The Monk group made a ten-day benison ceremony on the top of the Crashing Hillock. The gods were so moved that they scattered the benison crystals all over. It was these that were made into the legendary rings.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by the advanced manufacturing Benison Rings.

card.卡片說明: Evil chef Berssif burned the fly's wings when he blew out his birthday candles. The poor fly could only walk sadly around.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Fire Fly in the Lava Cave, the Flaming Door, the Underground Square and the Hell Palace.

card.卡片說明: The Coward Mosi often attacks others hiding in groups. However, if he is caught he never confesses and escapes quickly.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Rat Mosi in the Magic Kichen Path.

card.卡片說明: Help the lovely girl to complete her wish. Then look at her happy smile, it can make you happy as well.
card.卡片提示: The little girl on Shining Coast cannot find her beautiful shell. Please help her! (Related quest: Little girl's wish)

card.卡片說明: It is a kind of giant turtle, enjoying the sunshine. But be careful that you are not mistaken for a big stone.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Puqi Turtle on the Gold Beach.

card.卡片說明: Walking in the sun may have affected the shell of the Puqi Crab. It can be found due to the burning smell.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Puqi Crab on the Gold Beach.

card.卡片說明: He considers himself the host of the Gold Beach. He will jump out from behind rocks whenever a traveller goes by. What an annoying guy!
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Pontiff Hululu on the Gold Beach.

card.卡片說明: The old man on the dock regards you as the true guard of coast. How honorable of him!
card.卡片提示: The old man on Shining Coast sighs at the sight of the damaged environment, are you able to change the situation? (Related quest: Return my clean sea)

card.卡片說明: They stay on the west coast of the Puqi Island under the orders of the Pirate Captain. They often follow adventurers and rob them.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Puqi Pirate in the Shining Coast.

card.卡片說明: He is the leader of Puqi Pirates and has terrible bad breath. But all of the Puqi Pirates are loyal to him.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Puqi Pirate Leader in the Shining Coast.

card.卡片說明: The waves whacking at the peaceful coast is certain to have something to do with the Coast Protector. It seems to be his duty to keep people going to the other side of the sea. What secret does the remote side hold?
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Coast Protector in the Shining Coast.

card.卡片說明: Winning the trust of the Mermen is proof of courage and wisdom.
card.卡片提示: The Mermen of Dream Ocean have taken action! What could have worried them so much?

card.卡片說明: Promoted up from a Soldier Crab, it now wants to make it's mark as a General. Anyone who disobeys him is certain to be punished.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Color Crab General in the Shining Coast or the Colorful Coral Reefs.

card.卡片說明: Beat lover Octopus seems to be hard at work, but actually, it is destroying the bilge with it's beatings.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Wood Octopus in the Colorful Coral Reefs or the Dream Ocean.

card.卡片說明: Regardless of their odd appearance, team work is the mermans's biggest weapon. Don't fight them alone.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Leader Nio in the Blue Sea or the Dream Ocean.

card.卡片說明: We award you with this card in recognition of your determination and will for protecting the coral. May your persistence never end.
card.卡片提示: Don't think that Guang of the Puqi Village only eats chocolate. He also protects the coral. And he pays a lot of attention to it. Repeatable quest. (Related quest: Displace coral reefs)

card.卡片說明: The Octopus wishes to practise his handwriting with his own ink. However, how can it write in the sea? No wonder he is angry and scrawls on the faces of others.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Ink Octopus in the Colorful Coral Reefs or the Dream Ocean.

card.卡片說明: Wielding a rapier in florid coral sea, its colorful shell may be the best camouflage you have ever seen. Take care of yourself from it's invisible rapier!
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Whelk Swordsman in the Colorful Coral Reefs or the Wave Harbor.

card.卡片說明: He is the best at shooting. The resistance of seawater doesn't affect him at all. Good luck to his targets.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Sharp-shooter Canss in the Colorful Coral Reefs.

card.卡片說明: The sea is once again pure and clean, thanks to your efforts, which also prove the scientific power of Iron Castle.
card.卡片提示: Ocean Scholar Joey in the Palm Base wants to purify the sea. Please assist him! Repeatable quest. (Related quest: Eliminate impurity)

card.卡片說明: You want to help the Slow Grandpa, but he cannot stop chattering.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Whelk Mage in the Colorful Coral Reefs or the Wave Harbor.

card.卡片說明: How can they continue playing the bad jellyfish has stolen their beachball. He is so mean.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Beachball Jellyfish in the Colorful Coral Reefs or the Wave Harbor.

card.卡片說明: He is well protected by slippery tentacles and sharp stings. Pay attention to them and be careful.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Stab Jellyfish in the Wave Harbor or the Blue Sea.

card.卡片說明: This one loves to play with his sword. It is said that once he joined a sword competition and came in last place because his tentacle got all tangled up. From then on, he formed the habit of beating people with his sword.
card.卡片提示: You may obtain it by defeating the Sword Jellyfish Jackly in the Wave Harbor.

card.卡片說明: You are a kind man to help Teny use her skills. She will never forget you.
card.卡片提示: By mentioning the shell brooch, you can't help but praise Teny's skills. It is even more outstanding when matched with the scarf or the amice. Repeatable quest. (Related quest: Vagrom artist)

card.卡片說明: You are a kind man to help Teny use her handicraft. She will never forget you.
card.卡片提示: By mentioning of shell necklace, you can't help but praise Teny's skills. Only she could make such a delicate necklace. Repeatable quest. (Related quest: Vagrom artist)

card.卡片說明: You are a kind man to help Teny create her romance. She will never forget you.
card.卡片提示: How romantic the bracelet is! It being given as a love token is a wonderful thing. Repeatable quest. (Related quest: Vagrom artist)

card.卡片說明: You are a kind man to help Teny play to her creativity. She will never forget you.
card.卡片提示: Only Teny can create such wonderful handicraft. It is useful and beautiful. Girls love it very much. Repeatable quest. (Related quest: Vagrom artist)

card.卡片說明: The Top Pearl can only be found after spending a very long time in the sea.
card.卡片提示: Only in the deepest depths of the sea may the Top Pearl be found. The quantity left is so small.
